name: Unstuffed Mushroom Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Bacon, finely crumbled OR Imitation Bacon Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the mushrooms.
2. Combine the diced mushrooms, shredded Monterey Jack cheese, bacon (or bacon bits), sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, and hot sauce in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 1-quart casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle seasoned bread crumbs evenly over the top of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until the cheese has melted.
6. Serve hot. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Tomatoes, Bell Peppers, Chili Peppers, Bread Sticks
